# Extensions.IsValidName method

Returns `true` when *name* is a valid extension name (the part after the slash). An empty name is permitted (spec R-6.5-e, R-6.5-f).

```csharp
public static bool IsValidName(string name)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| name | The candidate name. |

## Return Value

`true` when the name is empty or well-formed.
